name: Aenugu Manish Reddy
summary: Final-year Computer Science undergraduate specializing in Web Development, Blockchain, and Artificial Intelligence. Demonstrates a strong aptitude for practical application and innovation, evidenced by multiple wins at regional and national hackathons. Skilled in prototyping, collaborative problem-solving, and rapidly acquiring new technical skills. Seeking a challenging software development role to contribute to emerging technologies.

projects.title: Procto Plus
bullets: Developed a system to revolutionize virtual assessments, ensuring security and integrity through blockchain innovation.

projects.title: PharmaChain
bullets: Engineered a blockchain-powered healthcare system with AI integration for secure health records and drug authenticity.
Implemented features to prevent fraud using Ethereum, IPFS, and Python.
Building impactful solutions using AI with Python, DevOps, and region-specific datasets.
Led blockchain advocacy on campus, driving student engagement through events and strategic networking to connect innovators with tech leaders.

name: Vedhin Govind
summary: Full-stack developer with expertise in building web applications using Node.js, Express.js, and MongoDB. Possesses a strong foundation in computer science fundamentals, including Java, Python, and data structures, with additional experience in AI/ML technologies. Has successfully architected and deployed multiple projects, such as an AI-powered news aggregator and a hotel management portal, demonstrating skills in API design, database optimization, and secure authentication. Proven leadership and mentorship abilities are highlighted through roles as President of the Web Club and a mentor for first-year students.

projects.title: Hotel Management Portal
bullets: Architected a full-stack hotel management system with secure authentication, serving 100+ listings and 500+ user reviews.
Engineered robust MongoDB schemas and RESTful APIs with middleware validation, ensuring high uptime and data integrity.
Optimized database queries and implemented caching strategies, improving application response time by 35%.

projects.title: Business Digest – AI-Powered Briefing Engine
bullets: Developed an AI-powered news aggregation platform integrating Groq LLM and GNews API to deliver personalized business insights.
Architected a secure backend with Node.js and MongoDB, implementing OAuth authentication via Passport.js for over 500 users.
Designed scalable RESTful APIs to support a React + TypeScript frontend for real-time competitor analysis and trend forecasting.

projects.title: Community Crop Exchange Platform
bullets: Engineered a collaborative agricultural platform for 200+ farmers, reducing crop wastage by 40% through resource sharing.
Implemented a WebSocket-based real-time communication system, accelerating trade negotiations by 60%.
Developed location-aware filtering algorithms and secure authentication to streamline resource discovery.
Spearheaded technical initiatives by orchestrating 10+ workshops and hackathons, enhancing web development skills for over 700 students.
Forged strategic partnerships with industry professionals to secure mentorship opportunities and real-world project exposure for members.
Mentored 40+ first-year students in C programming fundamentals, developing a curriculum that improved their coding proficiency by 85%.
